name: single
description: Single-cam monologue talking-head short (no numbered tabs). Same chain as listicle. Use when the clip is one continuous answer without the rapid-fire numbered structure.

notes.reframe.preset: talking-head (most common for desk talking-head) or stage if stage cam
notes.captions: Plain spice style — no category tabs/pills. Use caption-clips generate_spice.py output without the tabs pass.
